capabilities.name: Create File
capabilities.description: MVP: validates a create_file prompt (requires payload.path + payload.description). On success, executes by creating parent directories as needed and writing payload.content (or an empty string if omitted) to the file at payload.path, resolved relative to the repository root.

capabilities.name: Read File
capabilities.description: Read a file from the repository root

capabilities.name: Append Event
capabilities.description: Append a JSON line event to dev/janus-bridge/logs/events.log (append-only).
